cards.back: A water-borne disease caused by the bacterium Vibrio cholerae, characterized by severe diarrhea and dehydration
A water-borne disease caused by parasitic flatworms, leading to liver, bladder, and intestinal problems
A water-borne disease caused by the bacterium Salmonella Typhi, characterized by fever, headache, and abdominal pain
A water-borne disease caused by the bacterium Legionella pneumophila, characterized by pneumonia and flu-like symptoms
A water-borne disease caused by parasitic worms, leading to intestinal problems, anemia, and weight loss
